parameters.query:
SET search_path TO "case", public;
SELECT
  i.id,
  i.mentorado_id,
  m.nome AS mentorado_nome,
  m.responsavel,
  i.sender_name,
  LEFT(i.conteudo, 300) AS conteudo,
  i.timestamp,
  i.tipo_interacao,
  i.urgencia_resposta,
  i.prioridade,
  i.message_id,
  i.chat_id,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.timestamp)) / 60, 0)::int AS minutos_pendente,
  CASE
    WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.timestamp)) / 3600 >= 24 THEN 5
    WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.timestamp)) / 3600 >= 12 THEN 4
    WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.timestamp)) / 3600 >= 8  THEN 3
    WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.timestamp)) / 3600 >= 4  THEN 2
    ELSE 1
  END AS tier
FROM public.interacoes_mentoria i
JOIN "case".mentorados m ON m.id = i.mentorado_id
WHERE i.requer_resposta = true
  AND (i.respondido = false OR i.respondido IS NULL)
  AND i.eh_equipe = false
  AND i.timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours'
  AND i.timestamp < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours'
  AND m.ativo = true
  AND m.nome NOT ILIKE '%teste%'
  AND m.telefone NOT LIKE 'PENDENTE%'
  AND m.telefone NOT LIKE '0000%'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM public.interacoes_mentoria resp
    WHERE resp.chat_id = i.chat_id
      AND resp.eh_equipe = true
      AND resp.timestamp > i.timestamp
      AND resp.timestamp < i.timestamp + INTERVAL '3 hours'
  )
ORDER BY tier DESC, i.timestamp ASC;

nodes.name: Buscar Pendentes no BD
nodes.notes: Inclui m.responsavel para filtrar por carteira.

nodes.name: Enviar Heitor
nodes.notes: Heitor recebe SO pendencias da SUA carteira.

nodes.notes: Lara recebe SO pendencias da SUA carteira.
